response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial contributions via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in routing, navigation, or distributed geospatial pipelines — key requirements for this role. His DLang and Node.js background shows adaptability, but the absence of proven C++ in production routing systems and limited evidence of OS/distributed systems work for high-reliability data pipelines raises significant gaps.
strengths: Built open-source geospatial platform (GISCollective) with real-world NGO usage
Demonstrated ability to learn and apply diverse languages (DLang, Node.js, C++) across domains
Strong track record in testing, CI/CD, and developer tooling with measurable impact
concerns: No explicit C++ or Rust experience in routing, navigation, or map tiling systems
Lack of demonstrated expertise in distributed systems, fault tolerance, or real-time data consistency at scale
Primary recent work is in TypeScript/Node.js — minimal evidence of low-latency systems or geospatial data optimization
